_comment: Central config (ADR-005, NFR-2). Thresholds mirror PRD_graph_analysis §2.2 and PRD_agent_workflow §6. Edit target_repo/model to taste; pricing defaults to 0 so token-only comparison still works until real rates are filled in.

target_repo._note: Clone into data/target (git-ignored), then run graphify extract on it. Biggest graphable target from the assignment §3 list (5 modules / 446 LOC). buggy-python is the smaller fallback.

graph_analysis._comment: Tuned for the broken-python target (16 graphed nodes, sparse call graph): the Polygon class is the central hub + articulation point (degree centrality 0.27, fan-in 2), which graphify independently flags as the God Node. PRD_graph_analysis defaults (0.50/20/15) are calibrated for large repos.
